name: Team Todd
subject: We are up to bat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF TODD YOUNG, INC
body:
The 2020 election cycle was nothing short of historic. Republicans were able to gain seats in the House, and win in all state legislatures across the country.
Friend,

The 2020 election cycle was nothing short of historic. Republicans were able to gain seats in the House, and win in all state legislatures across the country.

It was also full of record breaking fundraising numbers for Democrats, Friend. Democrats spent hundreds of millions of dollars in multiple states. We need to lay the foundation with strong fundraising numbers early in this election cycle.

Become a founding member of Todd's reelection efforts to make sure we can continue fighting for Hoosiers, keep taxes low, create job opportunities, and defend our rights.

name: State Republicans (via RSLC)
subject: We did it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee, 1201 F Street, NW, Suite 675, Washington, DC 20004
body:
This wouldn't have been possible without your help
Friend,
We won.
**With your help, we not only held the line in critical states like Georgia, North Carolina, Florida, Kansas, Minnesota, Iowa, and Texas -- we FLIPPED State Legislative Majorities from Blue to Red in New Hampshire. **
This wouldn't have been possible without your help, Friend. **Your support is what got us to the successes we have today.**
The numbers were stacked against us at critical moments -- the Democrats raised a historic amount of money to defeat us, and the liberal media did everything they could to undermine us.
Even though we've all finished casting our votes, we can't ignore the possibility of recounts and runoff elections that are still on the table.
We hate to ask after all the work that has been done to protect our Republican State Majorities, but we need additional resources to help fully fund these critical efforts. [**Will you chip in now? Every last dollar makes a huge difference!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Fso8FUOSo5YOsMXft3N2ryp58qAeL_Dc7HomEVTUUVBqGFjHqUIyQGcS9IFkOshG1qr-DRuwAL3GOVRlaqtLmc-vqhjmGh6Yae9QZaIN0rGr8xjGrSwyK97IFHB8j-glFT5i-wC7a4VHPqxx2HgGlJ9xWWOFZ1QlCdruMxGhKbbg0c9u05ijX72xn9m8qHleSrDKZOmQwOan7jns709cU0AZLeXlK64u6Upc-fzgptRiMDXtFUxqTqR7Hht8pmNE0n8ZXIZ-2otN8kF0YDKH_0ErFlmzvS5JS7YBOnRh0b8zQRIpuU3MyuKCxJlUHFHSa8HN39-mMQP9MSuNP2TlCBdwgAf4FWw7lNMpGEoGJdevldrikUAYCawPdoE7wcjyl8IS0xQmiupQsrLifwNzKnX27yPU-dLJdu15f7rufxAY8AqIot78Dn3qH7yBSJhu&c=splfztL_Qe02eLuxcTlVTtH9KLJ6gj-sAthk2KstB8Hmb0pz12-9jw==&ch=lM2ZiTuqzEKXOdt6nCYWHL_22LtTBUMV4PrRM9UIwHJrofoMUQ0G8A==)

I've said it before and I'll say it again -- I've never backed down from a fight and this time is no different. I watched my mother get taken advantage of by a broken political system and have spent every day since fighting on behalf of hardworking Americans. That's why I took on the socialists in Sacramento to return over $400 million to California taxpayers and why I'm ready to stop Pelosi's socialist agenda in its tracks.

To buy the last ads people will see before they went to the polls, to get out the vote, to try and flip this seat from BLUE to RED emptied our accounts. == Friend, Getting to November 3rd took everything we had. To buy the last ads people will see before they went to the polls, to get out the vote, to try and flip this seat from BLUE to RED emptied our accounts. But the fight's not over yet and we need your help to stay in the fight. Can you chip in $5, $10, or even $25 to the CA-48 Recount Fund? It 's the only way to ensure we can combat the army of lawyers Pelosi has lined up to drag this battle out in court. CHIP IN TO THE CA-48 RECOUNT FUND | ==** == == == == == I've said it before and I'll say it again -- I've never backed down from a fight and this time is no different. I watched my mother get taken advantage of by a broken political system and have spent every day since fighting on behalf of hardworking Americans. That's why I took on the socialists in Sacramento to return over $400 million to California taxpayers and why I'm ready to stop Pelosi's socialist agenda in its tracks. == Right now we're in the lead -- defeating Pelosi's handpicked candidate -- but there are still thousands of votes left to count. We have to keep fighting until the bitter end. == ==** == Thank you, Michelle Steel Donations to the recount fund may not exceed $2,800 per person or $5,000 per multicandidate political committee. name: David Kubal
subject: Hold the line
body:
Dear Praying American,
I know what you're feeling. Like you and me, many Americans are feeling anxious, weary, worried...and expectant for the results of this election.
It certainly poses two **_very_** different paths for our nation's future.
And there is immense pressure on our election officials, ballot-counters, and now- on our election integrity legal teams nationwide.
That's why I wanted to come to you --- a prayer warrior I can trust --- with a prayer request for these Americans who are in the trenches fighting for each vote to be truthfully counted...
[**Will you join me today in prayer by signing our Election Integrity Prayer Card?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X9_cP5AnjpxwgsM9tdn6eQQuxzkYhj0O3bziXRS8X6PAHJtf-ReMm3Gg_QWuRt-U7R-HESXpxxDYPSvH5XtSL9lH_JdLluhWaspdlf4HgZpJH8NQEs6Kl_EaiQSLAWlPPvMXRAHIMsA3gbli36ifLSYWewp8h8VZg3d4bNZjQoWaCKBqqyBgfqwfHxzUSyRmBiFoT6srosacqTkjyUQADIRdaHKLmxM1CYTkd9d7Wuw=&c=qmonK-BUoCgi2ke9sonVimk8d_rv_iSfOPcRke9XiXUeHZW7QSZoeg==&ch=r2u94qtZis994N2-r1Xwlia-n8yROvZhT3-89vYUNmcfBUZiW_REVQ==) The stakes are high...
Faith in free and fair elections is a critical need in your state today.
But I've got to be honest with you, friend, there is something big, a deep shift going on in our country right now. Underneath the surface of election and ballot turmoil, there is another truth that must be addressed: _**There is a spiritual battle for the heart of America being waged right before our very eyes.**_
And I don't know about you, but I want to be the kind of believer who steps up, joins the fight, and pleads God to be with our people.
The men and women who are counting, verifying, certifying ballots in order to protect the 2020 election results _need_ _your_ _prayers_.
Believer, scripture tells us in 2 Chronicles 17 _" If my people, who are called by my name, shall humble themselves, and pray, and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways; then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin, and I will heal their land."_
[**So, will you heed this command, humble yourself and seek God 's face with me today by signing the Election Integrity Prayer Card?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X9_cP5AnjpxwgsM9tdn6eQQuxzkYhj0O3bziXRS8X6PAHJtf-ReMm3Gg_QWuRt-U7R-HESXpxxDYPSvH5XtSL9lH_JdLluhWaspdlf4HgZpJH8NQEs6Kl_EaiQSLAWlPPvMXRAHIMsA3gbli36ifLSYWewp8h8VZg3d4bNZjQoWaCKBqqyBgfqwfHxzUSyRmBiFoT6srosacqTkjyUQADIRdaHKLmxM1CYTkd9d7Wuw=&c=qmonK-BUoCgi2ke9sonVimk8d_rv_iSfOPcRke9XiXUeHZW7QSZoeg==&ch=r2u94qtZis994N2-r1Xwlia-n8yROvZhT3-89vYUNmcfBUZiW_REVQ==) We are praying for free and fair elections.
We are praying against fraud of any kind.
We are praying for the men and women who are working tirelessly to enforce a legal and honest count of your vote.
Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is David Kubal and I'm blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA).
Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders.
That's exactly why I've written to you today...
I've got to be honest with you, friend--in a time when there is so much confusion and concern over this election, it's going to take believers like you to stand up and pray for God's kingdom to come and for his will to be done here on this earth. [**Will you do that today by praying over the sanctity of our nation 's election?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X9_cP5AnjpxwgsM9tdn6eQQuxzkYhj0O3bziXRS8X6PAHJtf-ReMm3Gg_QWuRt-U7R-HESXpxxDYPSvH5XtSL9lH_JdLluhWaspdlf4HgZpJH8NQEs6Kl_EaiQSLAWlPPvMXRAHIMsA3gbli36ifLSYWewp8h8VZg3d4bNZjQoWaCKBqqyBgfqwfHxzUSyRmBiFoT6srosacqTkjyUQADIRdaHKLmxM1CYTkd9d7Wuw=&c=qmonK-BUoCgi2ke9sonVimk8d_rv_iSfOPcRke9XiXUeHZW7QSZoeg==&ch=r2u94qtZis994N2-r1Xwlia-n8yROvZhT3-89vYUNmcfBUZiW_REVQ==) Because you and I both know there are evil forces in this world which would like to see our nation torn apart. The strong, God-fearing United States of America you and I know is a threat to the enemy's agenda.
But believers like you and me are called to step in and join the battle through spiritual warfare. The entire country...actually, the entire world... has its eyes on this election.
* Domestic enemies would like to see our God-fearing nation crumble.
* Foreign enemies would like to see our God-fearing nation crumble.
* And spiritual enemies would like to see our God-fearing nation crumble.

Us Christians **MUST** hold the line...with honest and humble prayer to our Lord and Savior. We need all election integrity officials to stand firm and protect the vote for all citizens in your state. We need them to be guided by Godly wisdom. **That 's where you come in.** I've got to encourage you, as scripture tells us in Esther 4:14 "Perhaps you were made for such a time as this". **Believer, your prayers are needed for such a time as this.** [**Add your name to the Election Integrity Prayer Card today**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X9_cP5AnjpxwgsM9tdn6eQQuxzkYhj0O3bziXRS8X6PAHJtf-ReMm3Gg_QWuRt-U7R-HESXpxxDYPSvH5XtSL9lH_JdLluhWaspdlf4HgZpJH8NQEs6Kl_EaiQSLAWlPPvMXRAHIMsA3gbli36ifLSYWewp8h8VZg3d4bNZjQoWaCKBqqyBgfqwfHxzUSyRmBiFoT6srosacqTkjyUQADIRdaHKLmxM1CYTkd9d7Wuw=&c=qmonK-BUoCgi2ke9sonVimk8d_rv_iSfOPcRke9XiXUeHZW7QSZoeg==&ch=r2u94qtZis994N2-r1Xwlia-n8yROvZhT3-89vYUNmcfBUZiW_REVQ==) A former United States president once said, _" There is no greater peace than that which comes from prayer and no greater fellowship than to join in prayer with others"._ I agree. And while I know you may be overwhelmed and confused, we must choose to stand firm and pray. [**Will you join in fellowship today as we get millions of Americans praying for our nation? **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X9_cP5AnjpxwgsM9tdn6eQQuxzkYhj0O3bziXRS8X6PAHJtf-ReMm3Gg_QWuRt-U7R-HESXpxxDYPSvH5XtSL9lH_JdLluhWaspdlf4HgZpJH8NQEs6Kl_EaiQSLAWlPPvMXRAHIMsA3gbli36ifLSYWewp8h8VZg3d4bNZjQoWaCKBqqyBgfqwfHxzUSyRmBiFoT6srosacqTkjyUQADIRdaHKLmxM1CYTkd9d7Wuw=&c=qmonK-BUoCgi2ke9sonVimk8d_rv_iSfOPcRke9XiXUeHZW7QSZoeg==&ch=r2u94qtZis994N2-r1Xwlia-n8yROvZhT3-89vYUNmcfBUZiW_REVQ==) Thank you for your support. God Bless, David Kubal,
President & CEO

clean_body: Dear Praying American, I know what you're feeling. Like you and me, many Americans are feeling anxious, weary, worried...and expectant for the results of this election. It certainly poses two very different paths for our nation's future. And there is immense pressure on our election officials, ballot-counters, and now- on our election integrity legal teams nationwide. That's why I wanted to come to you --- a prayer warrior I can trust --- with a prayer request for these Americans who are in the trenches fighting for each vote to be truthfully counted... == The stakes are high... Faith in free and fair elections is a critical need in your state today. But I've got to be honest with you, friend, there is something big, a deep shift going on in our country right now. Underneath the surface of election and ballot turmoil, there is another truth that must be addressed: There is a spiritual battle for the heart of America being waged right before our very eyes. And I don't know about you, but I want to be the kind of believer who steps up, joins the fight, and pleads God to be with our people. The men and women who are counting, verifying, certifying ballots in order to protect the 2020 election results need your prayers. Believer, scripture tells us in 2 Chronicles 17 " If my people, who are called by my name, shall humble themselves, and pray, and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways; then I will hear from heaven, and I will forgive their sin, and I will heal their land." == We are praying for free and fair elections. We are praying against fraud of any kind. We are praying for the men and women who are working tirelessly to enforce a legal and honest count of your vote. Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is David Kubal and I'm blessed to be the President and CEO of an army of prayer warriors called Intercessors for America (IFA). Our mission at IFA is to inform, connect, and mobilize intercessors to pray for our nation and our leaders. That's exactly why I've written to you today... I've got to be honest with you, friend--in a time when there is so much confusion and concern over this election, it's going to take believers like you to stand up and pray for God's kingdom to come and for his will to be done here on this earth. == Because you and I both know there are evil forces in this world which would like to see our nation torn apart. The strong, God-fearing United States of America you and I know is a threat to the enemy's agenda. But believers like you and me are called to step in and join the battle through spiritual warfare. The entire country...actually, the entire world... has its eyes on this election. Domestic enemies would like to see our God-fearing nation crumble. Foreign enemies would like to see our God-fearing nation crumble. And spiritual enemies would like to see our God-fearing nation crumble. Us Christians MUST hold the line...with honest and humble prayer to our Lord and Savior. We need all election integrity officials to stand firm and protect the vote for all citizens in your state. We need them to be guided by Godly wisdom. That 's where you come in. I've got to encourage you, as scripture tells us in Esther 4:14 "Perhaps you were made for such a time as this". Believer, your prayers are needed for such a time as this. == A former United States president once said, " There is no greater peace than that which comes from prayer and no greater fellowship than to join in prayer with others". I agree. And while I know you may be overwhelmed and confused, we must choose to stand firm and pray. == Thank you for your support. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: It all comes down to Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
I'm in the fight of my life against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) to flip Georgia's Senate seat blue. And according to _The Washington Post_ , what happens here could determine whether Democrats are able to secure Senate control and enact our bold agenda. I urgently need your help to win this race -- but before I ask you to chip in, I need to give you an update on why your support is so important.
**Right now, our momentum is unbelievable.** After starting this campaign trailing our GOP opponent, our people-powered movement surged into first place -- something pundits said was impossible just a few months ago. Now, we've forced a head-to-head runoff election with Kelly Loeffler on Jan. 5 -- and experts from Nate Silver to NBC News say we can really win this thing. In other words: **We're within striking distance of defeating the Republicans and making history.**
Here's the bad news: With all eyes on Georgia, Loeffler is spending over $20 MILLION of her personal fortune to defeat me, and the GOP is funneling in millions more to buy this seat for Mitch McConnell and block the Democratic agenda. Experts say this could be the most expensive race in history.
I don't take a dime from corporate PACs -- I never have and I never will. But with Republicans spending MILLIONS to defeat me and keep this seat red, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to win. [**So please, will you give $3 or more right now to defeat the GOP and flip this Georgia seat blue?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc610/2a380d31/20271615/f04107/4255194961/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
There's far more than a Senate seat on the line in this race. My opponent is a far-right Trump loyalist who has run a campaign of divisiveness and bigotry. Meanwhile, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service -- and in January, I could become Georgia's first-ever Black senator. With health care and the future of the Supreme Court on the line, we simply can't afford to send another Trump Republican to Washington.
My campaign set a goal to raise another $25,000 by midnight to defeat Kelly Loeffler -- and in a race this close, falling short just isn't an option. But unfortunately, our campaign is not on track to raise what we need to win -- which could mean we have to take our ads off the air and cut back our voter protection efforts.
We can only win Georgia and secure Senate control for Democrats with immediate support from folks like you, everyone. So please, I'm personally asking because the stakes are so incredibly high: [**Will you give $3 or more today to help us win in Georgia, defeat the GOP and secure a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc610/2a380d31/20271615/f04107/4255194961/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thanks for pitching in at this historic moment.
Raphael Warnock

> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc610/2a380d31/20271615/f04107/4255194961/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0cnciLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMTEwOF8xMTA1bXdoNHJ3LXJzX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4rw?refcode=e20201108_1105mwh4rw-rs_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc610/2a380d31/20271615/f04100/4255194961/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Here in Georgia, our democracy hangs in the balance.

Team—
Many thought that this was not possible, that it would take a miracle to flip Georgia blue.
_But it didn't take a miracle._
It was our blood, sweat and tears. Our relentless drive to get our fellow Georgians to the polls. Our determination to send a statement to the defeated Trump administration and the Republican enablers that have infected our federal and state government. **And, now it looks like Georgia is in the Biden-Harris column.**
Our work isn't over. As sweet as it is to have defeated Trump, Mitch McConnell will still hold the reins of power in the U.S. Senate unless Georgia can deliver in the two Senate runoff elections. As long as that's the case, the best efforts of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to turn this country around will be blocked, just as McConnell did in the first days of President Obama's administration. **Georgia can change that by flipping TWO U.S. Senate seats.**
All of us with the Georgia Blue Project have been in the Georgia trenches for years. Like many of you, we have been working for decades to bring about this day. Our strategy of supporting State House and State Senate candidates got results with four seats flipped. Our efforts trickled UP the ticket as well, helping to re-elect Lucy McBath, elect Carolyn Bourdeaux and yes, helping push Joe Biden and Kamala Harris across the finish line. **And — in what might be the most consequential outcome — we helped put two U.S. Senate seats in play.**
[**_We must now prepare for that pair of contentious U.S. Senate special elections. Republicans will fight to hold these seats, but they cannot fathom the fight they will meet in us. Until we seize the majority from Mitch McConnell, our democracy will be stifled. Team, can you chip in $40 — $20 for each Senate race — today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21321041/260416912/-293505166?refcode=em11082020-PM-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1OTY2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1NzBjYzI0LTA2MjItZWIxMS05ZmI0LTAwMTU1ZDAzYWZmYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=EpyIDwCLznI2PNrmNpUwu_LPcXzOUx8kB4Wl0vkWO48=)

Friend,

This Election isn’t over yet and it’s imperative that we keep FIGHTING for every single LEGAL vote to be counted.

name: Mike Kelly For Congress
subject: The President Needs Our Help!
body:
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.169349.aspx)
Dear Peter,
We are at a critical time in the fight to ensure ethical elections. The Trump Campaign is looking for:
1) People to oversee ballot counting at your local elections office. If you are interested, please call Peter at 814-273-6347. While it is an 814 area code, it is applicable to anyone in Butler, Crawford, Erie, Lawrence, or Mercer counties.
2) Attorneys. The need for those who practice law to oversee the counting of provisional ballots in our district is crucial. If you are an attorney that lives in Butler, Crawford, Erie, Lawrence, or Mercer County, please email Kathy at [KGallagher@porterwright.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/50.169349.aspx).
**_Thank you for your continued support and God Bless America!_**
My best,
_Mike_
[](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.169349.aspx)
_P.S. _You can like our [Facebook ](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.169349.aspx)page [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/2.169349.aspx) , follow us on [Twitter](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.169349.aspx) [](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/3.169349.aspx) , or contribute to my campaign at [www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/7.169349.aspx). Your contributions are greatly appreciated!
**[www.mikekellyforcongress.com](https://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/gateway/1.169349.aspx)**

[To safely unsubscribe, please click here](http://www.trailblz.info/kellymike/Unsubscribe.aspx?eid=A3639956702C41A36C1D84C5E9E48DE8B8932DB129F20F15E59C002D948A70D4) | [Spam Policy](http://www.trailblz.com/spampolicy.aspx)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by mike@mikekellyforcongress.com
Mike Kelly For Congress | PO Box 476 | Lyndora | PA | 16045

name: True the Vote
subject: Validate the Vote
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3032)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Friend,

If you are confused by news developments announcing results of the 2020 presidential election, you are not alone.
The media has declared a victor, yet votes are still being counted in key battleground states like Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin, and many ballots remain unaccounted for or are not yet validated. Right now, there is significant tangible evidence of fraud, counting illegal ballots, dead people voting, and system failures – potentially enough to sway the legitimate results of the election battleground states.

[We launched Validate the Vote to ensure 2020 election returns reflect the principle of "One vote for one voter" and to repair our broken elections once and for all.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?notrack=1&s=af02e6342144ec20b7fe9b56063beba7&i=303A675A18A3032) This initiative focuses on investigating vote irregularities, pursuing every legal avenue, seeking a fair and impartial judicial decision, and restoring confidence in our American election process so that people around the world can again look to our nation as a shining example of free and fair elections.

Validate the Vote aims to uphold the constitutional rights of every voter and expose, fight, and remedy fraud where it has occurred – this is the very purpose of why True the Vote exists. Now is the time our actions matter most. The legitimacy of our leaders, the ability to govern, and the preservation of our election system are at stake.

That's why we created a whistleblower fund of over $1,000,000 available to support those who come forward with credible evidence of criminal malfeasance. We've received thousands of reports from patriots around the country through our Election Integrity Hotline. [If you or someone you know has witnessed election fraud, manipulation, or illegal activity, please report it on our website or call 855-702-0702.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?notrack=1&s=af02e6342144ec20b7fe9b56063beba7&i=303A675A18A3015)

All credible claims are being reviewed. Additionally, our data and legal teams are reviewing findings and evaluating legal options. What are we discovering? Facts like these....

In just the top 10 counties in Pennsylvania, there are over 265,000 registered voters with addresses that the U.S. Post Office doesn’t even recognize. That's a lot of questionable mail ballots! How many voted? We don't know yet, because Pennsylvania is still counting....

---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3033)
---
| | | Our infomercial, "The Most Important Video of the 2020 Election," released in September, warns of the vast security gaps in election laws and processes, and details the very path of the destruction of free and fair elections playing out right now.

---
| | [ WATCH ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3033)
---
| | True the Vote will remain at the forefront of investigating this process and ensuring this scenario is never allowed to happen again. We will keep working to verify that every legally cast vote counts and every illegally cast vote does not. We will keep providing resources for those on the front lines during the extended ballot counting process to document and report any illegal or unethical activity with the confidence that these issues will be pursued by every available legal channel.

If you have ever thought about donating to the cause of election integrity, now is the time! We need your help!

---
| | [ FUND OUR FIGHT ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3016)
---
| | If our elections are not truly fair, we are not truly free. Stay strong – this is far from over!

Onward!
---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
---
| | P.S. Make no mistake – this is far from over. The following is a timeline of key dates surrounding this contested election:

---
| | Dec. 8: “Safe Harbor” – date by which states must certify results and assign electors. If an election is in dispute, state legislatures may assign electors. Dec. 14: Electors meet in their states to cast votes for the president and VP. Jan. 3: New Congress is sworn in; 117th session starts. Jan. 6: Electoral votes are counted in House chamber by members of House and Senate; if neither candidate has 270 electoral college votes, the election is in dispute. Jan. 20: Inauguration Day – new president takes oath of office. In a disputed election, the House will appoint the president and Senate will choose the VP.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3026) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3027) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3028) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=303A675A20A3029)
---|---|---|---|---|---|---

name: Lee Griffin For Congress
subject: The Future Is Ours
body:
Hi everyone, This has been a long, strange week in keeping with a long, strange year. But the votes in Pennsylvania have been tallied and th
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/fdNMf6lh4/c?w=T5eqyru0-CUV2UqJ7CVzvO23I3TP0Hb217MjQeYvki4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby9mZE5NZjZsaDQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Hi everyone, This has been a long, strange week in keeping with a long, strange year. But the votes in Pennsylvania have been tallied and the elections have been called. Our campaign did not win our bid for the congressional seat to represent PA-12. But as I've said before, this campaign was not just about winning an election. This was about taking a stand for the future of our families, our communities and our country. This was about declaring boldly that we will stand by each other in times of crisis and times of ease and that we believe that our best days are ahead of us. We did just that, and today we all look forward with hope and optimism for the days and years to come. I am so proud that we helped carry our Commonwealth for President-Elect Joe Biden and Vice President-Elect Kamala Harris. And make no mistake, we had an impact on the outcome of their election. Yesterday, the race in Pennsylvania was called by a margin of 41,223 votes, which was the decisive moment for the Biden-Harris ticket. I said many times that Pennsylvania was going to decide the election and that has proved true. And just as importantly, our work in rural Pennsylvania made that possible, in a very real and tangible way. In our 15 counties, Joe Biden won 22,388 more votes this year than Hillary Clinton did in 2016. Our votes in rural PA made the difference. We made that happen. YOU made that happen. Every phone call and postcard, every dollar donated, every post and share on social media, and every conversation on the sidewalk that got voters to the polls contributed directly to yesterday's decisive moment. I am so proud to have been a part of these efforts, and I hope you are too. Today we celebrate a hard earned and well deserved national victory. Today we breathe in the fresh air of possibility and hope, and exhale a sigh of relief. But this is not the end of our journey. This is the beginning. There is still so much to do to rebuild our country and create a joyful future for us all. Today we celebrate. Tomorrow we get to work. Congratulations to all of us. Take care, stay safe, and I will be seeing you soon.Lee
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: ICYMI: In a sea of hyperpartisanship, a glimmer of hope - The Boston Globe
body:
Vermont is bluer than blue but gave Governor Phil Scott, a Republican, an overwhelming mandate. |
---
| |
# **In a sea of hyperpartisanship, a glimmer of hope**
_Vermont is bluer than blue but gave Governor Phil Scott, a Republican, an overwhelming mandate._

By Kevin Cullen - [The Boston Globe](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4fd4af87e7&e=19cebfe173) - November 5, 2020

MONTPELIER, Vt. — Some thoughts while printing up the “Don’t Blame Me. I Voted For Kanye” T-shirts.

While officials in a handful of states continued to count votes, and Joe Biden inched his way toward the presidency, the only unquestioned winners are the lawyers who are going to clean up with all of the legal challenges filed by the Trump cartel.

Scanning popular analysis, a common theme is that the only indisputable conclusion to draw from the 2020 presidential election is that this remains a country uncomfortably and intractably divided.

But there are pockets of optimism, a glimmer of the idea that the hyperpartisanship that has infected our body politic — as ruinous in its own way as the virus that has paralyzed so much of ordinary life — can be tempered.

Take what happened here in Vermont on Tuesday.

Donald Trump was thoroughly rejected by an electorate that is overwhelmingly white, liberal, and progressive.

But before you chalk that all up to all those earthy-crunchy, Birkenstock-wearing, Ben & Jerry’s-eating hippies, consider that the state’s Republican governor, Phil Scott, rode to an overwhelming victory over his Democratic/progressive challenger, David Zuckerman.

Scott garnered almost 70 percent of the vote.

That’s crazy.

Especially when you consider that there are more blue herons in Vermont than Republicans. Well, not really.

But a funny thing happened the other day. People here voted for the person they thought was best suited for the job. For president and governor. Party affiliation, of both the voter and the candidate, had little to do with that calculus.

It’s not just Vermont. Three of the states where Trump received the lowest percentage of votes — Massachusetts, Vermont, and Maryland — have electorates with Democratic majorities and popular Republican governors.

They are also governors, who, unlike the leader of their party, listen to public health experts when it comes to combating a pandemic. Governors who have been willing to criticize said leader if he has said something offensive or patently untrue.

That takes political courage, and such honesty and basic decency were rewarded here on Tuesday, when Phil Scott cruised to a lopsided victory over the sitting lieutenant governor.

Scott has been widely credited with deftly handing the pandemic here, listening to his chief medical adviser, Dr. Mark Levine, aka the Tony Fauci of the Green Mountains. Vermont has had the nation’s lowest infection and death rates all along. Scott has regularly deflected credit, saying it was ordinary Vermonters who deserve praise, because they have worn masks and adhered to social distancing not necessarily to protect themselves, but to protect their families, friends, and neighbors.

Scott was reluctant to impose an order making masks mandatory, because he said Vermonters didn’t have to be forced to care about their neighbors. In the end, he made masks mandatory because of the influx of summer tourists.

Garrison Nelson, a professor at the University of Vermont and the state’s most astute political scientist, said political parties are notoriously weak in Vermont. Beyond the lack of institutional partisanship, he said Vermonters' sense of neighborliness keeps the partisan bickering and backbiting to a minimum.

“Look,” he said, “there’s 630,000 people in a relatively small geographical area and we all know each other. If you get stuck in the winter, you want your neighbor to be willing to pull you out of the ditch. Cold weather is a great equalizer. We are obliged to look after one another.”

Hyperpartisanship thrives especially in the anonymity of social media.

“There’s not a lot of anonymity in Vermont,” Nelson said.

Also a fact: If you manage to convince Vermonters you’re competent at your job, they are loath to bounce you out.

As Nelson notes, since 1872, only one incumbent governor has been defeated; no elected senator has ever been defeated; and only two sitting congressmen have been voted out.

Nelson also believes the town meeting form of government puts a check on partisan excess.

“You have to maintain civility and conviviality to be governed,” he said.

Civility to be governed? Now there’s a concept.
---

You can [update your preferences](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=75128fb49c&e=19cebfe173&c=243f50c4ce)

If you get stuck in the winter, you want your neighbor to be willing to pull you out of the ditch. Cold weather is a great equalizer. We are obliged to look after one another.” Hyperpartisanship thrives especially in the anonymity of social media. “There’s not a lot of anonymity in Vermont,” Nelson said. Also a fact: If you manage to convince Vermonters you’re competent at your job, they are loath to bounce you out. As Nelson notes, since 1872, only one incumbent governor has been defeated; no elected senator has ever been defeated; and only two sitting congressmen have been voted out. Nelson also believes the town meeting form of government puts a check on partisan excess. “You have to maintain civility and conviviality to be governed,” he said. Civility to be governed? Now there’s a concept. | | | | | | | | | | | | Phil Scott for Vermont, Glen Wright, Treasurer, P.O. Box 988, Montpelier, VT, 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: REMINDER: New guidance in effect today
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Around noon today, you should have received an alert on your phone letting you know that new guidance and restrictions are in effect in Rhode Island. Cases and hospitalizations are rising, but if we all work together and follow these new rules, we have an opportunity to turn the trend around and keep our economy open. As a reminder, the new guidance is listed below:
---
|
---
| 1. Effective today, a stay-at-home advisory is in effect from 10pm-5am on weeknights, and 10:30pm-5am on Fridays and Saturdays. At that time, unless you're going to and from work or running essential errands like getting food or going to the pharmacy, you should be in your own home. Not someone else's home - your home. We know that late-night house parties are a major factor in this second wave. And if you're at a restaurant or bar until that time, once it closes, drive straight home. We're not going to take a heavy hand - as always, our approach calls for voluntary compliance. But if we do see big parties at any time of day, and particularly at night, we will break them up and fine you.
2. Also effective today, all restaurants, bars, gyms, recreational facilities (such as casinos, bowling alleys, and museums), and personal services must close at 10pm on weeknights, and 10:30pm on Fridays and Saturdays. Restaurants can continue to offer takeout and drive-through after that time.
3. We're lowering the capacity limit for indoor events and venues of assembly to 50%, with a maximum of 125 people. For outdoors, the limit will be 66%, with a maximum of 150 people. This applies to things like performing arts venues, movie theaters, and houses of worship. I'd ask everyone to consider switching to virtual worship for the next few weeks.
4. We're reducing the limit for catered events to 25 indoors and 75 outdoors. If you already have a wedding planned in the next two weeks, we're able to consider an exception if you contact the Department of Business Regulation.
5. We're reducing the capacity limit at malls and big box stores - retailers with more than 30,000 sq. ft. of space - back to the Phase 2 limit of 1 person per 150 sq. ft. Over the last few weeks, we've started to see more crowding at these businesses, and we anticipate that will continue to increase as we head into a big shopping season.
6. In addition to working from home when possible, we're asking businesses to postpone or cancel nonessential work-related travel. We're also leading by example in this regard and have put a hiatus on work-related travel for state employees.
7. We're updating our masking guidance to require masks at all times with anyone you don't live with. That includes anytime you leave your home - including at the gym - and private gatherings if there's anyone there you don't live with.
Please, for the safety of yourself, your family, your friends, and your neighbors, make every effort to follow this important guidance. We can, as one united Rhode Island, save lives.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001h2yaqWqIw5TxV6SYxvHBbPojk2_m3oUX4SkyOL01jBtYwPxcG-D0FadxzBD4ItAzCMFl-LBRrjsSAc7QPubQ4pTKhebx70IyBGi6WMxd0FJynOHGAXzfM-QaCJfNf6z43UJIP1Y-yKc59OnFiFgHHbPWMV6ehnz_tBX0KoYF_3GRrDT7qSsORHMneTzepol5oF6-ryRTVPCMy3i03K2vAVrelwyfdIHPCrmPIZE0b1uKl35xoRAG0MJIrd8v3ZQcf6SxCV_KbH8st7_6lPTcDI5pVqjmFP92KifU6XORGVKYHDgt5TcI7rjf1DcvVOc3jSY_sw5dz9o=&c=P57-4bKdQVRvEYVpgqIYv06F7O1a_-0OAxeQ7W7YUdpMR8Preg73FQ==&ch=OfvF_qLHEghnI_04-xq42ISavbHAjdSg1_pCaprcA2KSVlHlSmJcbA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=8ca65185-4016-4295-830c-1788ab82418c)
---

name: Jim Oberweis
subject: We’re going to have to fight to make sure every LEGAL vote is counted
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim 2020 Committee
body:
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/290d9d0c8f42631a/4ccdc754474eb637c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Peter, We know you have heard a lot on this the past week, so we will make this update quick. We have had updates in 3 of 7 counties in the past week since Election Day, and the margin is still razor thin, with a slight edge for our opponent. **[We’ve launched a RECOUNT FUND, and our legal team is prepping the fight to make sure every single LEGAL vote is counted.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/290d9d0c8f42631a/426dac0d0d249e6ec3d6b838967d376c/34533)** [**RUSH SUPPORT FOR RECOUNT FUND**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/290d9d0c8f42631a/d52bbfe6485c9d08c3d6b838967d376c/34533) Our legal team is investigating, and no matter who comes out “on top” during this initial process we will absolutely move to a Discovery recount. At the end of the day, we expect changes to the vote count but NOT the outcome. With your help, we WILL prevail and send Jim Oberweis to Washington to represent OUR values, support instead of defund the police, and fight for law and order in our country again. [Please stand with us, as we fend off this challenge.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/290d9d0c8f42631a/d47c7d8757088a86c3d6b838967d376c/34533)
For The 14th, Team Oberweis [**RUSH SUPPORT FOR RECOUNT FUND**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/290d9d0c8f42631a/490a6567548b5e58c3d6b838967d376c/34533) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b49153ac4d1237a53a89ac0c84d83476/34533/290d9d0c8f42631a/305fbbc944c34575c3d6b838967d376c/34533)

clean_body: Peter, We know you have heard a lot on this the past week, so we will make this update quick. We have had updates in 3 of 7 counties in the past week since Election Day, and the margin is still razor thin, with a slight edge for our opponent.
